name: Ik ben Roxy
overview: ROXY DEKKER is a phenomenon. With her catchy beats and sassy girl-power lyrics, the twenty-year-old singer is quickly conquering the Dutch charts. She's breaking streaming records and winning award after award. In this documentary, you'll see Roxy working towards her very first show at Paradiso and candidly sharing how she's coping with success, pressure, and doubts.

trailers.title: Ik Ben Roxy | Officiële Trailer | Prime Video NL
